scripts.build: bun run build:resumable && bun run build:relay && bun run build:agent
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/resumable typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/relay typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/agent typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/resumable test && bun run --cwd packages/relay test && bun run --cwd packages/agent test
